Name: app-router-structure
Pattern: App Router file convention: page.tsx (route) / layout.tsx (wrapper) / route.ts (API)
Code:
src/app/
├── page.tsx              # / route
├── layout.tsx            # Root layout
├── (dashboard)/
│   ├── layout.tsx        # Auth guard wrapper
│   └── settings/
│       └── page.tsx      # /settings route
└── api/
    └── items/
        └── route.ts      # /api/items endpoint
Pitfall: Route groups with () don't affect URL; layout.tsx wraps all child pages
Keywords: nextjs app router page layout route structure file convention

Name: api-route-template
Pattern: Standard API route with auth and error handling
Pitfall: Always use getRequiredSession() for protected routes; return NextResponse.json with status codes
Keywords: nextjs api route template auth error handling json

Name: async-polling
Pitfall: Clear interval on unmount and terminal status; 3s is good balance of freshness vs server load
Keywords: nextjs async polling interval job status webhook alternative

Name: prisma-sqlite
Pitfall: Use singleton pattern to prevent multiple connections in dev (hot reload); run npx prisma migrate dev after schema changes
Keywords: prisma sqlite database orm schema client singleton

Name: zustand-store
Pitfall: Use Zustand for client-side canvas/editor state only; server state should use SWR or polling
Keywords: zustand store state management create hook

Name: shadcn-ui-v4
Pitfall: shadcn v4 changed from radix-ui to @base-ui/react; don't mix old radix imports with new shadcn
Keywords: shadcn ui v4 base-ui radix component install

Name: tailwind-v4
Pitfall: Tailwind v4 has NO tailwind.config.ts; all customization via CSS variables in globals.css
Keywords: tailwind v4 postcss config css variables theme

Name: oklch-theme
Pattern: oklch color space + CSS variable theming
Pitfall: oklch provides perceptually uniform colors; .dark class toggles dark mode
Keywords: oklch color theme css variables dark mode light

Name: server-vs-client
Pattern: Server Component vs Client Component decision
Pitfall: Default is Server Component; add 'use client' only when needed (hooks/events/browser APIs)
Keywords: nextjs server client component use client hook event

Name: dynamic-import-ssr
Pattern: Disable SSR for heavy client components
Pitfall: Use for components that access window/document or are very large (canvas
column8: nextjs dynamic import ssr disable client heavy component

Name: zod-validation
Pattern: Zod schema for API request validation
Pitfall: Use safeParse (not parse) to avoid throwing; return flattened errors
Keywords: zod validation schema api request body parse

Name: api-client-centralized
Pattern: Centralized API client with type safety
Pitfall: All fetch calls go through src/lib/api.ts; never call fetch directly in components
Keywords: nextjs api client fetch centralized type safety

Name: page-header
Pitfall: Icon with text-primary color + h1 text-2xl font-bold; consistent across all pages
Keywords: nextjs page header icon title consistent layout

Name: middleware-auth
Pitfall: matcher pattern controls which routes trigger middleware; exclude public routes and static files
Keywords: nextjs middleware auth route protection redirect
